metadata.description: Regenerates the Angular TypeScript client from the OpenAPI spec using openapi-generator-cli. Safe to run at any time. src/custom/ is NOT touched — it is the hand-written layer. NOTE: to regenerate from scratch (spec + client), use 'agentos-service:regenerate' which orchestrates generate-openapi-spec → this target.
Merges Playwright blob reports from atomized tasks to produce unified reports for the configured reporters.
Runs Playwright Tests in src/example.spec.ts in CI

options.command: echo 'Skipping npm publish for desktop - DMG will be uploaded to GitHub Release'

banner.js: import { createRequire as __createRequire } from 'module';import { dirname as __dirname_func } from 'path';import { fileURLToPath as __fileURLToPath } from 'url';const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);const __filename = __fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);const __dirname = __dirname_func(__filename);
